description: S.N.G.N. Romgaz S.A. is a Romanian public company engaged in the exploration, production, storage, and distribution of natural gas. The company also operates as an electricity producer and supplier, and provides technological transportation services. Romgaz is involved in geological exploration, well interventions, workovers, and special operations, and is a member of the European gas industry. The company is publicly traded on the Bucharest Stock Exchange and is majority owned by the Romanian State.

primary_naics.label: Other Heavy and Civil Engineering Construction

description: Fluor Corporation is an American engineering, procurement, and construction company that provides engineering, procurement, construction, maintenance, and project management services. The company operates in sectors such as energy, infrastructure, chemicals, government, life sciences, manufacturing, mining and metals, and technology. Fluor also offers architecture and planning, civil engineering, design, and technical services, as well as environmental services, logistics and supply chain management, and program management. The company serves clients in over 60 locations worldwide and is certified for its operations.

Skanska AB is a Swedish construction and development company engaged in project development, construction, and development services for residential, commercial, and infrastructure projects. The company operates primarily in the United States and serves a diverse range of clients across various sectors. Skanska also functions as an energy engineering and contractor, and is involved in civil engineering activities. Its operations are supported by a global supply chain and logistics network.

Tutor Perini Corporation is an American construction company engaged in civil, building, and specialty construction services. The company provides general contracting, project management, engineering, equipment manufacturing, federal prime contracting, green building, remote construction, self-performed services, surety services, and virtual design and construction. Tutor Perini serves a wide range of markets, including aviation, infrastructure, commercial, education, government and military, healthcare, hospitality and gaming, justice, manufacturing and industrial, mixed-use and retail, public assembly and entertainment, rail and mass transit, recovery and restoration, residential, science and technology, sports, tunnels and mines, and water. The company is a member of the National Association of Construction Managers (NACM) and the American Institute of Constructors (AIC).

PulteGroup, Inc. is an American homebuilding company engaged in the construction and sale of residential properties. The company operates under multiple brands and serves a range of homebuyers, including first-time, move-up, and active-adult buyers, across over 45 markets in the United States. PulteGroup also manages a supply chain and logistics network to support its homebuilding operations. The company is publicly traded and has received certifications for workplace culture and sustainability.

primary_naics.label: Turbine and Turbine Generator Set Units Manufacturing

description: Vestas Wind Systems A/S is a Danish manufacturing company engaged in the design, production, installation, and servicing of wind turbines. The company also provides development and digital services, including drone inspections and fleet optimization, and offers environmental services related to renewable energy. Vestas operates internationally, with manufacturing facilities and offices in multiple countries, and is involved in sustainability initiatives such as blade circularity, low-emission steel, and zero-waste wind turbines.
core_offerings: Blade Recycling and Circular Economy Solutions

description: Wipro Limited is an Indian multinational technology company engaged in information technology, consulting, and business process services. The company provides services in areas such as cloud computing, cybersecurity, data analytics, digital transformation, artificial intelligence, robotics, and engineering. Wipro serves clients across sectors including banking, financial services, telecommunications, media and information services, consumer goods, education, public sector, retail, travel, energy, manufacturing, aerospace, automotive, industrial manufacturing, natural resources, oil and gas, utilities, healthcare, life sciences, medical devices, technology products and services, and consumer electronics. The company operates globally, with a presence in major markets across the Americas, Asia Pacific, Africa, Europe, Middle East, and India.

Fujitsu Limited is a Japanese multinational corporation engaged in information and communications technology (ICT) equipment and services. The company provides IT services and solutions, including business and digital transformation, network and security services, IT and infrastructure operations, hybrid IT and cloud services, and consulting. Fujitsu serves a wide range of industries, including manufacturing, mobility and transportation, retail, public sector, finance, healthcare, and resources and energy. The company also operates in telecommunications, computer hardware, consumer electronics, software, data storage, cloud computing, and semiconductors. Fujitsu is publicly traded on the Tokyo Stock Exchange and is part of the Furukawa Group.

Telefónica Innovación Digital, S.L.U., known as Telefónica Venture Builder, is a Spanish company that operates as a venture builder and digital innovation provider. The company supports the development of digital business ideas and startups, offering services such as ideation, business plan development, and post-creation monitoring. Telefónica Venture Builder also engages in the creation of new companies based on digital technologies and collaborates with startups in sectors including financial services, e-commerce, media, entertainment, and logistics. Additionally, the company is involved in initiatives such as the Open Gateway project, which provides standardized APIs for telecommunications networks, and the CAMARA project, which aims to standardize network APIs across the industry.
core_offerings: Pay TV and ITC Services Distribution

description: Booz Allen Hamilton Inc. is an American company that provides management and technology consulting, cybersecurity services, digital transformation solutions, and artificial intelligence and cloud computing services. The company also offers software development, mission readiness support, and professional training and coaching. Booz Allen serves government agencies, commercial enterprises, international organizations, and nonprofits, with operations in the United States, Southeast Asia, and Europe. The company is publicly traded and is a component of the Russell 1000 index.

Lonza Group Ltd is a Swiss contract development and manufacturing organization that provides integrated solutions for the healthcare industry, including biologics, small molecules, and specialized modalities. The company operates across three business platforms—Integrated Biologics, Advanced Synthesis, and Specialized Modalities—offering services such as custom manufacturing, product development, and detection systems for the pharmaceutical and biotechnology sectors. Lonza serves clients in Europe, North America, and Asia, and is publicly traded on the SIX Swiss Exchange and the SGX Singapore Exchange.

Siegfried AG is a Swiss contract development and manufacturing organization engaged in the production of active pharmaceutical ingredients, intermediates, and finished dosage forms. The company provides services including process development, optimization, registration, production, packaging, and logistics for pharmaceutical and chemical clients. Siegfried operates multiple production sites in Switzerland, Germany, Spain, France, Malta, the USA, and China, and is ISO certified. The company also engages in research and development activities and is a member of the Dow Jones Sustainability Index Europe.

Alcon Pharmaceuticals Ltd. is a global pharmaceutical company engaged in ophthalmic pharmaceutical products and services, including surgical and vision care solutions. The company serves a broad market of over 260 million people in more than 140 countries, with a focus on research and development and a commitment to advancing access to eye care. Alcon also operates as a provider of ophthalmic pharmaceutical products and services, with a presence in the United States and a global commercial footprint.
